# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: web-http
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-allow-ingress
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: web-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
          namespace: linkerd
        - name: api
          namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-http
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: api-allow-web
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: api-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: default
        - name: worker
          namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: worker-grpc
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: worker-allow-api
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: worker-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: db-tcp
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: db
  port: 5432
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: db-allow-api-worker
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: db-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: default
        - name: worker
          namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: cache-tcp
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache
  port: 6379
  proxyProtocol: opaque

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: cache-allow-api-web
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: cache-tcp
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api
          namespace: default
        - name: web
          namespace: default

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-http
  namespace: observability
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics
  port: 9090
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: metrics-allow-prometheus
  namespace: observability
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: observability
